name: Creamy Italian Sub Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 package OSCAR MAYER All-American Sub SANDWICH VARIETY-PAK
8 KRAFT American Singles Pasteurized Process Cheese slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Miracle Whip LIGHT Dressing and House Italian Dressing together.
2. Toss the shredded lettuce with 1/4 cup of the dressing mixture.
3. Brush the cut surfaces of the rolls with the remaining dressing mixture.
4. Fill the rolls with the meat, cheese, vegetables, and lettuce mixture.
5. Makes 4 sandwiches.
